caption: The video appears to be a presentation from the OpenStack Summit, focusing on the cost-effectiveness of a cloud appliance solution called SurCloud. The presenter is standing on a stage with a laptop on a table beside him, likely delivering information about the financial benefits of using SurCloud compared to AWS (Amazon Web Services). The slide displayed behind him highlights the low cost of buying or leasing the SurCloud appliance, with prices ranging from $100K to $800K for purchase and $4K/m to $30K/m for lease, depending on configuration. It also compares the unit price of a 1 core 2G mem VM with 500G storage, showing that SurCloud costs significantly less ($9.94/m) than AWS ($41.22/m). The visual elements include a logo featuring a bird wearing a red cap and sunglasses, symbolizing freedom and innovation, set against a blue background with architectural illustrations.
